title: Prosaptia rhodocarpa
taxonomy: Prosaptia rhodocarpa is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. It belongs to the genus Prosaptia, which is a group of ferns endemic to Australia. The Lindsaeaceae family is a part of the larger group known as polypod ferns. These ferns are characterized by their simple leaves and lack of a true vein net. The classification of Prosaptia rhodocarpa is a key aspect of understanding the biology and evolution of this species.
